findings.description: Property names `cookiePath` and `cookieDomain` are defined in the source's configuration example and default-value list but are absent from s8 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source lists cookiePath (Path属性) and cookieDomain (Domain属性) as configurable properties in the XML example: `<property name="cookiePath" value="/" />` and `<property name="cookieDomain" value="" />`.

findings.description: The property name `userSessionSchema` is absent from s9 hints. The source explicitly calls out this property on `DbManagedExpiration` for customizing table/column names.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "DbManagedExpiration.userSessionSchema に UserSessionSchema のコンポーネントを定義する" and XML `<property name="userSessionSchema" ref="userSessionSchema" />`.
